name: The Undateables
overview: Hoon-Nam knows about love theoretically, but he rejects falling in love. Jung-Eum wants to fall in love, but, due to her difficult situation, she gives up on finding love. Hoon-Nam and Jung-Eum meet and develop a relationship romantically.

trailers.title: The Undateables (훈남정음) Trailer | Watch with subs 12 hours after Korea!
